list.name: pair
list.label: Pair
list.definition: SELECT id as __value, canonical as __text FROM pairs WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY canonical
list.query: SELECT id as __value, canonical as __text FROM pairs WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY canonical

targets.rawSql: SELECT q.ts as time, q.mid as value, v.name as metric FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE q.ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND q.pair_id = ${pair} ORDER BY q.ts

WITH cex AS (SELECT ts, mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()), dex AS (SELECT ts, mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.ts BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()) SELECT c.ts as time, ROUND((c.mid - d.mid) / c.mid * 10000, 2) as value, 'spread_bps' as metric FROM cex c JOIN dex d ON ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.ts - d.ts))) < 3 ORDER BY c.ts

WITH cex AS (SELECT mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} ORDER BY q.ts DESC LIMIT 1), dex AS (SELECT mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} ORDER BY q.ts DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT ROUND(((SELECT mid FROM cex) - (SELECT mid FROM dex)) / NULLIF((SELECT mid FROM cex), 0) * 10000, 2) as value

WITH cex AS (SELECT ts, mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.ts > now() - interval '15 minutes'), dex AS (SELECT ts, mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.ts > now() - interval '15 minutes') SELECT MAX(ABS((c.mid - d.mid) / c.mid * 10000)) as value FROM cex c JOIN dex d ON ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.ts - d.ts))) < 3

WITH cex AS (SELECT ts, mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.ts > now() - interval '1 hour'), dex AS (SELECT ts, mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.ts > now() - interval '1 hour') SELECT MAX(ABS((c.mid - d.mid) / c.mid * 10000)) as value FROM cex c JOIN dex d ON ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.ts - d.ts))) < 3

WITH rollup_max AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ABS((c.mid - d.mid) / c.mid * 10000)), 0) as spread FROM (SELECT interval_start as ts, close_mid as mid FROM quote_rollups q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.interval_type = '1m' AND q.interval_start > now() - interval '24 hours') c JOIN (SELECT interval_start as ts, close_mid as mid FROM quote_rollups q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.interval_type = '1m' AND q.interval_start > now() - interval '24 hours') d ON c.ts = d.ts), opp_max AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ABS(spread_bps)), 0) as spread FROM opportunities WHERE pair_id = ${pair} AND detected_at > now() - interval '24 hours') SELECT GREATEST((SELECT spread FROM rollup_max), (SELECT spread FROM opp_max)) as value

WITH cex AS (SELECT ts, mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.ts > now() - interval '15 minutes'), dex AS (SELECT ts, mid FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND q.pair_id = ${pair} AND q.ts > now() - interval '15 minutes') SELECT ROUND(AVG(ABS((c.mid - d.mid) / c.mid * 10000)), 2) as value FROM cex c JOIN dex d ON ABS(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.ts - d.ts))) < 3
SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM opportunities WHERE pair_id = ${pair} AND detected_at > now() - interval '15 minutes'

WITH threshold AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(min_spread_bps), 10) as min_bps FROM pair_venue_config WHERE pair_id = ${pair}) SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM opportunities o, threshold t WHERE o.pair_id = ${pair} AND o.detected_at > now() - interval '24 hours' AND ABS(o.spread_bps) >= t.min_bps

SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at))))::numeric, 2) as value FROM opportunities WHERE pair_id = ${pair} AND COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at) > now() - interval '24 hours' AND closed_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT ROUND(PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at))))::numeric, 2) as value FROM opportunities WHERE pair_id = ${pair} AND COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at) > now() - interval '24 hours' AND closed_at IS NOT NULL

WITH threshold AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(min_spread_bps), 10) as min_bps FROM pair_venue_config WHERE pair_id = ${pair}) SELECT ABS(o.spread_bps) as spread_bps FROM opportunities o, threshold t WHERE o.pair_id = ${pair} AND o.detected_at > now() - interval '24 hours' AND ABS(o.spread_bps) >= t.min_bps ORDER BY o.detected_at DESC LIMIT 500

SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at))) as duration_seconds FROM opportunities WHERE pair_id = ${pair} AND COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at) > now() - interval '24 hours' AND closed_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at) LIMIT 1000

SELECT COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at) as time, COALESCE(max_spread_bps, ABS(spread_bps)) as "Spread (bps)", EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_at - COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at))) as "Duration (s)" FROM opportunities WHERE pair_id = ${pair} AND COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at) > now() - interval '24 hours' AND closed_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY COALESCE(opened_at, detected_at) LIMIT 500

WITH threshold AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(min_spread_bps), 10) as min_bps FROM pair_venue_config WHERE pair_id = ${pair}) SELECT o.detected_at as time, ABS(o.spread_bps) as value, CONCAT(o.direction, ' (', o.status, ')') as metric FROM opportunities o, threshold t WHERE o.pair_id = ${pair} AND o.detected_at > now() - interval '24 hours' AND ABS(o.spread_bps) >= t.min_bps ORDER BY o.detected_at

WITH threshold AS (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(min_spread_bps), 10) as min_bps FROM pair_venue_config WHERE pair_id = ${pair}) SELECT COALESCE(o.opened_at, o.detected_at) as opened_at, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (o.closed_at - COALESCE(o.opened_at, o.detected_at)))::numeric, 2) as duration_s, ROUND(COALESCE(o.max_spread_bps, ABS(o.spread_bps)), 2) as max_spread_bps, o.direction, o.status, COALESCE(o.close_reason, '') as close_reason, ROUND(o.anchor_mid, 2) as cex_price, ROUND(o.dex_mid, 2) as dex_price FROM opportunities o, threshold t WHERE o.pair_id = ${pair} AND ABS(COALESCE(o.max_spread_bps, ABS(o.spread_bps))) >= t.min_bps ORDER BY COALESCE(o.opened_at, o.detected_at) DESC LIMIT 20

WITH latest_cex AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (q.pair_id) q.pair_id, q.mid as cex_mid, q.ts as cex_ts, v.name as cex_venue FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'cex' AND q.ts > now() - interval '10 minutes' ORDER BY q.pair_id, q.ts DESC), latest_dex AS (SELECT DISTINCT ON (q.pair_id) q.pair_id, q.mid as dex_mid, q.ts as dex_ts FROM quotes_raw q JOIN venues v ON v.id = q.venue_id WHERE v.venue_type = 'dex' AND q.ts > now() - interval '2 minutes' ORDER BY q.pair_id, q.ts DESC) SELECT p.canonical as pair, c.cex_venue, ROUND(c.cex_mid, 6) as cex_mid, ROUND(d.dex_mid, 6) as dex_mid, ROUND((c.cex_mid - d.dex_mid) / c.cex_mid * 10000, 2) as spread_bps, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - c.cex_ts)), 1) as cex_age_sec, ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (now() - d.dex_ts)), 1) as dex_age_sec FROM pairs p LEFT JOIN latest_cex c ON c.pair_id = p.id LEFT JOIN latest_dex d ON d.pair_id = p.id WHERE p.is_enabled = true ORDER BY ABS(COALESCE((c.cex_mid - d.dex_mid) / NULLIF(c.cex_mid, 0) * 10000, 0)) DESC
